tags.label: GenerativeArtGallery — artwork9 (Sacred Geometry / Fibonacci Spiral)
tags.description: Adapted from the Fibonacci spiral + kaleidoscope sketch. Points placed at golden-ratio angle intervals, distances proportional to sqrt(i). Rotational symmetry applied via push/rotate/pop. Points oscillate radially with sin(t + i*0.22). Connections drawn only to nearby spiral neighbors for performance. Ghost trail via low-alpha background.
